groups.name: Input Stem
groups.description: Stem layers downsampling the high-res input image to 56x56 prior to dense block propagation.

groups.name: Dense Block 1
groups.description: Densely connected block: 6 layers with growth rate k=32. Channels accumulate from 64 to 256.

groups.name: Transition Block 1
groups.description: Compresses channel volume from 256 to 128 and downsamples spatial grid by 50%.

groups.name: Dense Block 2
groups.description: Densely connected block: 12 layers with growth rate k=32. Channels accumulate from 128 to 512.

groups.name: Transition Block 2
groups.description: Compresses channel volume from 512 to 256 and downsamples spatial grid by 50%.

groups.name: Dense Block 3
groups.description: Densely connected block: 24 layers with growth rate k=32. Channels accumulate from 256 to 1024.

groups.name: Transition Block 3
groups.description: Compresses channel volume from 1024 to 512 and downsamples spatial grid by 50%.

groups.name: Dense Block 4
groups.description: Densely connected block: 16 layers with growth rate k=32. Channels accumulate from 512 to 1024.

groups.name: Global Pooling & Classification
groups.description: Global average pooling averaging spatial channels to a feature vector, followed by predictions.

groupedNodes.label: Input Stem
groupedNodes.description: Stem layers downsampling the high-res input image to 56x56 prior to dense block propagation.

groupedNodes.label: Dense Block 1

groupedNodes.label: Transition Block 1

groupedNodes.label: Dense Block 2
groupedNodes.description: Densely connected block: 12 layers with growth rate k=32. Channels accumulate from 128 to 512.

groupedNodes.label: Transition Block 2
groupedNodes.description: Compresses channel volume from 512 to 256 and downsamples spatial grid by 50%.

groupedNodes.label: Dense Block 3
groupedNodes.description: Densely connected block: 24 layers with growth rate k=32. Channels accumulate from 256 to 1024.

groupedNodes.label: Dense Block 4

groupedNodes.label: Global Pooling & Classification
groupedNodes.description: Global average pooling averaging spatial channels to a feature vector, followed by predictions.
